entry.title: SAC Connection to S4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,I am trying to create connections to S4HANA Cloud Private from SAC.The documentation that I found in SAP Help portal was about creating connection to S4HANA Cloud and does not specify Public or Private

Can we assume that the steps are same irrespective of Public or Private

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/00f68c2e08b941f081002fd3691d86a7/0485d540e0b340a0bc0da86fe368997c.html

entry.title: How to solved a DIR if that was released on tooling and have dirty flag?
entry.content: I have DIR file that was on tooling status with dirty flag. I try a new version and I can not do. I put the file on SP (locked) and because it has dirty flag I can not make a new version.

entry.title: Re: Distribution based on dynamic weights using #Variable...
entry.content:
@dionysis_evripidou 

Assuming other dimensions of the model are same in master data for Actual and Plan values. Something like below should work.

MEMBERSET [d/Product]=("Product A","Product B")
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date].[h/YQM], "2023")
MEMBERSET [d/Company_Code]="Company A"
MEMBERSET [d/Value_Type]=("020")
MEMBERSET [d/Measures]="Measure"

//Define variables

VARIABLEMEMBER #Weight OF [d/Product]

VARIABLEMEMBER #SumProduct OF [d/Product]

// Step 1: Calculate Total Actuals for 2023

DATA([d/Product]=#SumProduct)=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual",[d/Value_Type]="010")

 

//Step 2: Distribute the values

DATA()=RESULTLOOKUP([d/Version]="public.Actual",[d/Value_Type]="010")/ RESULTLOOKUP([d/Product]=#SumProduct)* RESULTLOOKUP([d/Product]="#",[d/Value_Type]="020")

//Step 4: Delete the data from "Unassigned" after the distribution

DELETE([d/Product]="#",[d/Value_Type]="020")

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Integration of CTMS as part of SAP Cloud ALM and CHARM
entry.content:
Hello Tom,

I dont see service no coming up in my RFC screen, its asking for port. additionally what should the connection results for both the rfc?

earlier for outside of clam, authentication RFC we have 400 bad request and for rest api prompt of user name and password.

Background: I have successfully done the integration of cTMS with charm outside cloud alm but facing issue while doing it inside cloud alm.

Best Regards

Yogesh Abhyankar

entry.title: insufficient privilege currency conversion to shared spaces
entry.content:
Hi 

I just want to confirm I'm not doing anything wrong and there is no workaround havng to build out any currency conversions in the 'end' Space raher than a 'shared' view from another space.

I am getting an 'insufficient privilege' error on the TCUR* tables when I use them in a Space where the DB user is assigned to that Space. I have shared the TCUR* tables with that Space, I have also tried doing the conversion in the previous space so it just carries through the 'calculated' fields but both attempts fail with this error.

The only method I have working is to share TCUR* tables with Space, generate TCUR* views of that table in the Space and then create the conversion field in my view in that Space. 

I have a 4 layer architecture (Inbound, Harmonisation, Propogation and Reporting). Propogation is in one Space and Reporting in many spaces (depending on user area). Ideally I would like to do the Currency Conversion in Propogation Space then share that view out to Other Reporting Spaces. Currently I have to recreate all Currency Conversions individually in all reporting Spaces along with ceating views of all TCUR tables in each reporting space.

Can someone confirm that there is no way around this? Seems a little mad, you can share views/tables from another space and DB user can see anything shared, why not currency tables and currency conversion calculations with a shared view?

 

Any help, most appreciated

entry.title: Re: How to search for only one property in Object Table o...
entry.content:
Hello @Jitendra_Kansal, The issue regarding productID is also resolved. Thanks for your suggestions and help

 let pageClientData =context.binding;
    let productId = pageClientData.productId;

    // Simple value assignment.
    let search = context.searchString;
    let qoB = context.dataQueryBuilder();
  let appFilter =`ProductId eq '${productId}'`;
    if (!search) {
       qoB.filter(appFilter);      
    }

    if(search && search != ''){
        let username = qoB.filterTerm(`substringof(tolower('${search}'),tolower(Name))`);
       
        qoB.filter(appFilter).and(username);

    }
    return qoB;

entry.title: Re: Distribution based on dynamic weights using #Variable...

entry.title: AP posting cannot get payment terms automatically from supplier master data
entry.content:
I used migration object "FI - Accounts payable open item" to migrate my AP open items data, the problem was that no payment terms on the journal entry items generated, payment term should be picked up automatically from supplier master data because it worked when I tested it with MIRO app in foreground.

 

Error sample by migration template: JE DIGITS (company code US01)

 

Correct sample by MIRO manually: JE PHONE_NUMBER (company code US01)

 

screenshots attached.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Customer Checkout - Billing localization for Port...

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring short dump metrics (e.g. last 5 minutes)
entry.content:
Hi

We use SAP Cloud ALM for monitoring our SAP productive systems.
Unfortunately, we are missing the following functions in Health Monitoring, which are available in SAP Solution Manager:
- Number of short dumps (last hour)
- Number of short dumps (last 5 minutes)

Will this be implemented soon?

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring short dump metrics (e...
entry.content:
Currently SAP Cloud ALM Health Monitoring offers only the metric "Short Dumps today" for on-premise ABAP based systems. It has a single event that can be configured for generating alerts, e-mails, etc.: "High Number of Short Dumps"

The public roadmap for SAP Cloud ALM does not currently have any entries related to Health Monitoring metrics related to short dumps.
No new developments are planned at this time. 


If you desire more Health Monitoring metrics or events related to short dumps, you will need access the relevant SAP Customer Influence campaign related to SAP Cloud ALM for Operations. 
The full list of campaigns can be found in KBA 3391676.

entry.title: Re: SMTP Server setup / XS855 error message
entry.content: It seems you're encountering issues with your current SMTP server setup (Host: 192.168.3.3, Port: 25). While troubleshooting, you might want to consider alternative SMTP server options like Digitalaka™ or SendGrid, which offer reliable email delivery services with robust features and support.

entry.title: Solman Alert Configuration step by step procedure
entry.content:
Need help on Solman 7.2 Alert Configuration , is there any blog / training available? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solman Alert Configuration step by step procedure
entry.content:
You can review SAP Learning  Journeys for SAP Solution Manager

https://help.sap.com/learning-journeys/500303897a261014beadaa51bacffcc3

Focus on Application operations SAP Solution Manager and Technical Monitoring in SAP Solution Manager
You can review as well if there is any Expert Guided Implementation session for SAP Solution Manager https://support.sap.com/en/offerings-programs/enterprise-support/enterprise-support-academy/expert-guided-implementation.html
Troubleshooting KBAs:
KBA 2569610 - Troubleshooting for notification issues in System Monitoring and Alert Inbox
KBA 3163781 - How to check notification settings at global, template and alert level to understand how the hierarchy works

entry.title: How to refresh or reload a page or explicitly call onLoad method Programatically in offline mode MDK
entry.content:
In MDK app I have a SideMenuDrawer and few menu items loaded into that. The menu items are pages and one of the menu items is set to "Status" which is clickable and based on the value of status changes, the pages which contain the list will load the appropriate entity set. So basically when the app loads pageA loads entitysetA1 considering the default value of status, now when I open the drawer and click the status its value got changed. PageA is already loaded so nothing gets refreshed. Now from the side menu if I open the pageB it will load with updated entitysetB1.Now again I open pageA it will load the list with entitysetA1 only. Now if i again click on the status it should pageA and pageB should load the entity set accordingly. I have created a rule for updating the entityset it works fine if i reopen the app after removing it from background. Bt when i am using the app nothing works accordingly. 

Now is there any way to refresh the page or any other option to resolve this issue.

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to embed a program or transaction into another program?
entry.content: With Dynpro technology, you cannot embed the screens of an existing transaction inside another screen, except if it was designed to permit that (like in SE84/SE90 or SE80).

entry.title: Compensation default values not updating on custom field change
entry.content:
Hello,

We are using the extra2 table to pre populate a % value for an additional increase. We have selected the option for the default value to display on custom field change. 

Example 

Forms launched and % assigned is 2.5%

After forms launch the custom field value is updated, instead of applying the new default value of 0%, the % changes based on the old $ amount, Is this expected system behaviour. How can we default the value to ensure the correct % is always applied?

entry.title: Re: ISA Segment issue for ASC-X12_856_005010.xsd
entry.content: Your schema for the 5010 envelope looks correct based on the information for the ISA segment. Did you run a trace to confirm that the conversion step is where the information goes missing? It doesn't make sense that the 856 XSD has anything to do with the issue because the definition only includes ST and below.

entry.title: Re: Event Recap: "Conversational AI with SAP Signavio and SAP Joule" by the SAP Experience
entry.content: @Ascha Great job breaking down a complex topic into a comprehensive read. This post has given much-needed insight into the future of AI in business process management. Keep these wondering ideas coming!

entry.title: Use all array values as dimension filter
entry.content:
I am trying to use a time slot filter for a chart in SAC. The filter should include all months from january till the current month. This is the code i am using, but unfortunalty it only shows the last month.

 

function onInitialization() : void


var currentDate = new Date(Date.now());


var currentMonth = currentDate.getMonth();


var timeSlot = ArrayUtils.create(Type.string);




chartCompare.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter("0CALMONTH2");




for (var i = 1; i<=currentMonth; i++)


{

 timeSlot[i]="0"+i.toString();



 chartCompare.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("0CALMONTH2", timeSlot[i]);


}

The chart is filtered by month but the previous months are removed.
Hope someone can help.
Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Creating Allowances from a Template
entry.content:
Hi,

it's hard to tell... did you check that the usage you posted was assigned correctly to the subscription? And the usage quantity >0? - These are pretty obvious things and you probably did everything right. - If all fails, kindly create a ticket with component CEC-SAL-SB.

Best regards,

Annette

entry.title: Auto Q block at storage location
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Is there a customizing (probably in QM module) that will enable creation of inspection lot after performing 311 movement type?

Idea is: when someone transfer stock from storage location 1 to storage location 2 system creates inspection lot and make that stock Q blocked.

Both storage locations are WM managed, if that is relevant.

BR,

Danko

entry.title: Schedule recurring processes on discrete dates, if not default every single W or M
entry.content:
Processes that are recurring throughout time, how can we schedule those advance in time, when we already know the discrete days on which these should be scheduled for the next year ahead.

In the app "Manage Recurring Processes", we can only choose weekly &/or monthly, correct (this would result it needing to be scheduled every single week &/or month)? What is the best workaround around these limitations?

entry.title: Node calculation Financial statement version FSV
entry.content:
Hello all, I would like to do some calculations of nodes in my FSV in our starter system for Public cloud V2402. 
I found applications Define Financial Statement Nodes: Summands and Define Financial Statement Nodes: Node Calculation in CBC for my starter system. 
I don't understand the process of doing the calculation operations (see the picture). I create a summand ID in the app Define Financial Statement Nodes: Summands for my existing node that I created in my FSV in the Manage financial statement versions app. 
I then add this new summand ID in some calculation on the Define Financial Statement Nodes: Node Calculation app, I save it, and when I download a PDF version of my balance sheet from the app Balance Sheet/Income statement there is no change. 

Is it calculation of nodes shown in the picture really functioning? Like node Y001 - Y002 + Y003. Is there anyone who knows the process? 

Thank you!

Thank you

entry.title: Re: ISA Segment issue for ASC-X12_856_005010.xsd
entry.content:
I was able to mock-up your example in our environment and identify the root cause.  The problem exists because the first qualifier field in the XML document should be named D_I05 instead of D_I05_1.  Interesting since the oldest envelope references in the early EDI configurations use D_I05_1 too which I used to model our custom framework - good news is I get to correct it to match the envelope schema expectation in CPI.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: what are the best classification for master data items ?
entry.content:
Dears 

I have case  with the customer he  needs to create extra classification for materials in master data as well as it will be used for P.R and P.Os reports 

for example material type is spare parts 

Material Group is Oils filters, Air Filters 

He needs to add another classification to be Filters contains (air and Oils filters )

So what is the best scenario to cover all the needed classifications

entry.title: mCreate RSCMSTH3 report is not making call to 3rd party content server API
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Recently I am trying to execute report RSCMSTH3 using Tcode SE38, but somehow it did not executes successfully..

Upon checking I found that only API calls related to mCreate are failing (mostly /info and /get for mCreate) and when I debugged codebase and tried to check if it is actually calling any API or not then I found that, SAP does have a logic which seems to call /mCreate API but at the backend side I am not receiving any call for /mCreate API request using either POST or PUT method.

Because there was no call at the backend to create multiple documents using /mCreate, subsequent APIs are failing..

 

I would like to know is there any other Tcode we can use or any other way we can go with, such that we will be able to execute RSCMSTH3 report and see if /mCreate API is working fine or not..

Any leads would be appriciated.

Thanks

entry.title: ENQUEUE_E_CRM_ORDER
entry.content: I lock the document with ENQUEUE_E_CRM_ORDER in a method in abap. But when I release the code with F8, I check it from SM12. The lock is lifted. How can I prevent this? I see the lock has been removed. How can I prevent this? I want the lock to continue until I remove the lock.

entry.title: Re: Too many calls for external tax calculation
entry.content: Hello, Did you able to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: [ISSUE] in [SAP Build Apps] with Creating custom components
entry.content:
Hey there, dear community!

The original question didn’t receive many reactions, but I wanted to report back on it since actions have been taken to address the issue.

In the latest Community version update that I noticed yesterday, this issue has been resolved. So a big shoutout to the team!

There have also been some UI improvements within the Composer itself. Creating custom components with encapsulated logic works as expected, and it was super fast to import a component from one app into another with the 'Copy to clipboard' feature.

Just a minor note: if a component uses logic flows that aren’t installed in the target app, those will disappear. So make sure you have all required flows installed before importing a new component.

entry.title: SAP RDP connection to SAP ECC
entry.content: I made some research and saw that SAP Responsible Design and Production  can be connected also to SAP ECC, but apparently you need the "SAP RDP Integration Accelerator" as an integration package with predefined integration content (compatibility of integration package depending on system release), custom implementation or data import via predefined Excel templates: could you please kindly provide more info about this accelerator and how this connection would work?

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup

entry.title: How to Update Attendance after it was submitted to Learning History
entry.content:
Hello!

After an ILT course was completed, attendance was updated and submitted for learning history. When attendance was updated, someone was marked as a no show in error. I would like to go back to adjust their completion status to complete, but when I go back to update attendance and submit to learning history with a different status, I receive the error below. 

How can I change an ILT completion status for a learner after attendance has already been added to learning history?

entry.title: Re: Document Splitting in New General Ledger
entry.content: Nice one thanks for sharing your knowledge

entry.title: Extract SAP long text into SQL server
entry.content:
Hi, Is there a way to read SAP long text for e.g. BOM long text, routing long text etc...

We are using SQL Sever to extract and transform sap data and then load in to S/4 HANA. Since the long text is stored in STXH and STXL,  and STXL contain text in RAW format, it is not possible to extract using SQL.

SAP Data services or Syniti tool is not an option for us.

Please let me know if there is a way to extract sap long text into SQL server

entry.title: Adding New Value in the Existing Field in C4C
entry.content:
Problem – There are 3 existing categories of a product. Company has launched new category. They want to add this new category listed with existing category. Now there should be 4 category displayed in the dropdown list in C4C.

Solution – New category can be listed along 3 existing categories in C4C by Adaptation. Steps are listed below-   

Step 1 :- Navigate to Customer > Accounts

Step 2 :-  open any existing account

Step 3 :- Click on user profile and Select "Start Adaptation"

Step 4 :- Select layout as "Master Layout"

Step 5 :- Go to Account page & click on edit button present on the header of account page

Step 6 :- Click on Overview and search for the field in which you want to add a new value.

Step 7 :- Click on edit button in the overview section

Step 8 :-  Click on the Edit option available on the right corner

Step 9 :- Add the required new value "Option 4”  in the list value table & mention language and description for the value - Save it

Step 10 :- Click on user profile and Select "End Adaptation"

Conclusion - After completing all steps new value will be available in the existing fields in C4C.

entry.title: Re: 1MV Cash Application Machine Learning Model - How to...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

 

so basically the more data you have usually helps to cover also different pattern. But from a data point of view, more data does not mean automatically "better results". It depends also on the quality of the data.

 

Small example: let's assume in the first quarter of 2023 you hired 30 new colleagues in your department and as they are new on the job they keep doing a lot of wrong postings and clearings, but they generated around 20k of bank statement items posting. Now the year earlier in quarter four, you had only 10k clearings and postings, but with 0 wrong postings. So the 10k data as a dataset is better than those 10k + the new 20k from those new hired colleagues. I hope you see my point.

 

Overall, I would always try to use as much data as possible, but also always have an eye on the "quality of data". If you did a quarter later a lot of reversals because you find out these 30 colleagues messed up a lot of postings and clearings, the Machine Learning Model does not know that right. So in such a case I would of course do immediately a retraining with the new clearings and postings, otherwise the ML engine will propose crap.

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

entry.title: Re: SAP eDocument installation
entry.content: @YasirHayat - the pricing of DRC has a dependency on your backend system and which country/countries are in scope. I don't think you will have the feeling that your company is overpaying for services, hence it is best to contact the SAP AE with the scope : )

entry.title: Reconciliation between asset subledger and general ledger
entry.content:
What report will allow me to reconcile previous months of posted depreciation from the asset subledger to the balance sheet accounts. The Asset History Sheet S_ALR_87011990 only provides numbers from the previously posted month. Thank you


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reconciliation between asset subledger and general le...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, there is no report in Asset Accounting to reconcile posted and planned depreciation by single months; mostly because at some assets, for technical reasons, planned depreciation of a period can be posted in the next one.

You may follow KBA 2032547 - Reconciliation FI and FI-AA. ABST2 Differences

though and check the FS10N and AR02 values by the end of each month.

entry.title: Re: SAP Associate Consultant
entry.content: Interested @Jillhanna

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Hi @stuart0891 - Thanks! It would have been cool to share as a separate discussion though 😄

entry.title: SAPUI5 Tables: Maximizing efficiency through advanced Copy & Paste
entry.content:
SAP Fiori provides a modern, intelligent, and consistent user experience for SAP solutions. The technologies & tools of SAP Fiori, such as SAPUI5 and SAP Fiori elements, offer extensive capabilities for building, extending and running SAP's business applications. When using SAP Fiori, you'll tap into a whole world of generic features of SAP's technologies, that make your life easier. From Joule, SAP’s AI Copilot down to clever copy & paste capabilities, you'll be amazed at how you survived without them.

Advanced Copy & Paste and cell selection

SAPUI5 1.124 improves copy & paste operations in tables, letting business users work even more in a natural way with improved productivity. See these common scenarios:

1. Copy data from a table
Copy data from a table by selecting rows or a group of cells ('lasso select') and paste to a MS Excel sheet or other applications. Play with the sample application Table - CellSelector, CopyProvider.


Picture 1: Row selection

Picture 2: Cell selection

2. Paste data to a table
Paste tabular data from some source to a table in an SAPUI5 application. This typically initiates a handling of new entries, depending on the application. Use the sample application Cell Selection, Copy & Paste to test.

3. Copy a set of values from a table to another field such as a filter field
Use sample app Smart (Responsive) Table with Criticality to try this.

 Picture 3: Copy from a cell selection

Picture 4: Paste copied cells

4. Handling split cells with multiple values
In the pictures above you see a column with combined product name and its ID. To handle this, the MS Excel export offers a 'Split cells with multiple values' option. You can achieve a similar behavior for copying data by using 'Paste Special… -> As Unicode Text' when pasting into MS Excel. (See details in Copying and Pasting from External Applications to Tables and CopyProvider.extractDataHandler.)

Picture 5: Paste Special in MS Excel

For application developers

To enable the Copy and Cell Selection features for a table in your custom application, see the details in:

  • API Reference: CopyProvider
  • API Reference: CellSelector
  • Samples: Table - CellSelector, CopyProvider

Please note: While these features are built into the Smart Table as well as the Responsive Table and Grid Table control, the availability in individual applications might depend on whether the application enabled the feature. This is the case for applications based on SAP Fiori elements and many other SAPUI5 apps.

In this context, please see details on the Spreadsheet Export. Also note that the Responsive Table received a comprehensive update of its keyboard handling.

entry.title: Re: How to Restrict an Employee from Overbooking the time in S4HANA Cloud for Professional Services
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

thanks for the great explanation!
We are on public cloud 2402, and we would like to aktivate this feature. In our version the total hours of the work package are per standard devided on months. The budget control now checks against the hours of the month. We would like to have the check on the hours of the total workpackage. Do you have a hint how we could achieve that?
Thanks a lot!

Best regards
Anja

entry.title: Re: ABAP Call Monitor (SCMON) – Analyze usage of your code
entry.content:
Hi OLga, I greatly appreciate the value of the SCMON functionality, and after some experiences with the latest S/4HANA versions, I have an idea I'd like to share.

To enhance performance and efficiency, I suggest setting the related SCMON tables (SCMON*) to benefit from the SAP HANA Native Storage Extension (NSE) by configuring them to "Page Preferred" in the standard delivered system, similar to how the CDPOS table is managed.

Does this make sense to you?

Sergio

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Unable to register Microsoft 365 external authentication
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have a requirement to read an excel sheet hosted on sharepoint and so I have configured an external authentication profile in SAP Build process automation portal. I have also completed its pre-requisite of creating Microsoft entra ID (Azure AD) application using Configure Azure Application | SAP Help Portal which generated clientID and client secret where in I have applied all the necessary permissions. The same along with tenant ID was used while configuring the external authentication profile.

I have an IRPA agent installed in my local machine and it is able to display the same profile. I entered my email address associated with Microsoft 365 and hit the register button, it opened a new page where in I logged in successfully. Post login, it redirected me to a page having URL https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient?code=xxyzz becuase the same URL was specified in the Configure Azure application link above, this URL displays a blank page and nothing happens afterwards.

I believe instead of https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/nativeclient, it should redirect to some build process automation page where it should receive the ?code=xxyyzz to complete the authentication cycle.

Has anyone faced this issue? Need help

entry.title: Re: ENQUEUE_E_CRM_ORDER
entry.content:
Any call of DEQUEUE FM or statement COMMIT/ROLLBACK WORK explicit or implicit (e.g. end of transaction, SUBMIT without RETURN, LEAVE TO TRANSACTION) can remove the lock.

  • If not aware, look for SAP LUW and SAP LOCK concept
  • Check sy-subrc, the lock may fail if already locked
  • Paste your code in text mode (menu ... then </>) and not a picture
  • To try to maintain the lock use _SCOPE parameter (e.g. 3 for program and update task)

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Sâo Paulo 2024
entry.content: Let's go to this great event!

entry.title: Button create report (general tab) and template (header/footer) not works SAP Disclosure Management
entry.content:
Hi guys! How are you?

Please, I need help... I created a report and when I execute the create button to generate the report, this button executes but does not generate any report/revisions.

Execute button create:

Show generating report content message:

After does not show any revisions or report generated.

Another point is that I have a template being applied to a horizontal chapter with header and footer and it also does not generate correctness when I try to generate a view of the entire document (Word or PDF), it only works when I look at the isolated chapter.

Original chapter doesn't have header and footer, it uses the template and create in previews:

Preview pdf chapter isolated ok:

Preview pdf all report:

This second problem occurs due to the first, do I need to create the report so that the templates work well in the previews?

Thanks,

Felipe B.

SAP Disclosure Management

entry.title: Re: Fiori LaunchPad get error when launching
entry.content: don't be bothered if your flp is still working

entry.title: Re: Update multiple records in one infotype
entry.content: I am using the function module HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA to update IT 0009 (PA0009), making a separate call for each record. If there are records for a single PERNR, but with different subtypes, it is changing all subtypes to '0'. I have the PSPAR filled with all the PAKEY values to identify the record to be updated. I also have those fields, as well as the fields to be updated, loaded into the PROP_T table. How can it change my infotypes to '0'?

entry.title: Re: How to display custom data in the custom section of f...
entry.content:
here you go

https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/a357047be956436ebb1dfebf1aa29af2

entry.title: Execute custom logic at permission import
entry.content:
Our business is uploading permission data via the "Data File Load" app. We noticed that in some cases the contact IDs contain upper case characters, however, all IDs in the SAP Marketing Cloud are stored in lower case. It seems as this is an issue and the Marketing Cloud is case-sensitive in this case as the import monitor shows an error "No contact found for ID SAP_HYBRIS_CONSUMER...". Of course, the business can make sure to always upload the IDs in lower case. However, if possible, I would like to implement some custom logic to make the contact IDs always lower case before the further execution takes place. I tried several BadIs but it seems as none of them is executed at permission upload - at least the custom logic trace is not logging anything. 

  • CUAN_IMPORT_IC
  • CUAN_FIND_INTERACTION_CONTACT
  • CUAN_IMPORT_IA_4_IC
  • CUAN_IA_REVISE_FOR_IMPORT

Did someone already implement custom logic at permission upload and can point me to the right direction? 

Best
Christian

entry.title: SAP PROJECT SYSTEM BASICS
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to SAP PS (Project System). Can someone please me the basics of Project System like what is coding mask and Project length with example, easy cost planning, availability control etc. I am completely new to PS and want to learn all basics. I will be very thankful to you for this. PLM (Product Lifecycle Management). PLM Project System (PS)

entry.title: Impulsa tu Docencia: ¡Capta Interés y Despierta Curiosidad con SAP y ERPsim!
entry.content:
Mostrar como SAP y ERPsim ofrecen herramientas valiosas para la educación universitaria, permitiendo a los estudiantes aprender jugando y desarrollar habilidades necesarias para el mercado laboral actual.

30-jul: ERPsim Sustainability. Conoce más acerca del simulador empresarial interactivo en donde los estudiantes toman decisiones de negocios en tiempo real usando un sistema basado en SAP S/4HANA con foco en los juegos de Sostenibilidad.

31-jul: Analítica con ERPsim: Aprende cómo se pueden utilizar múltiples softwares analíticos para conectarse a los datos generados al jugar ERPsim.

1-Aug: Narrativa de datos: Enseña a tus estudiantes a elucidar historias cautivantes basadas en datos, utilizando técnicas de visualización para extraer conocimiento de la información empresarial con la nueva experiencia gamificada de HEC Montreal en colaboración con SAP.

Esperemos contar con su participación en caso de interés. Y en caso de comentarios por favor déjennos saber en los comentarios. Gracias! 

Su SAP University Alliances Team

entry.title: Re: Digital Signature for Form16 .PFX file needed - Urgent
entry.content: Hi, I've a .pfx file with password provided by vendor. can anyone tell me how to implement the Dig Signature into ADOBE Form for Tax Invoice PDF?

entry.title: Re: Impulsa tu Docencia: ¡Capta Interés y Despierta Curiosidad con SAP y ERPsim!
entry.content: En breve compartiremos el enlace para el registro!

entry.title: SAP ERP – PP61 T-Code – Managerial control for related Personal Subarea
entry.content:
Hi,

We want to give T-Code PP61 for use of Managers in order to add Substitutions for their employees for shift planning.

But we want them to open their workers shift planning table by adding personnel subarea code .

Picture-1 from screenshot

So we created and specified new Profile for shift planning and changed Entry Object type from Organization to Personnel Subarea. After that Although Personnel area and Personnel Subarea lists are displayed and  we choose them nothing happens. We cant display anything.

Picture-2 from screenshot

As we understand it is because of the wrong Evaluation path

Picture-3 from screenshot

We tried to create a custom evaluation path from T778A table but couldn't find appropriate object type relationships (for exp. I1 > S > P , or O > S > P >I1) . Can we create such evaluation path ? But we don’t know exactly whether that would help us or not . Looking forward for your assistance. We couldn’t find any information about object types and relationships anywhere

Picture-4 from screenshot

entry.title: how can i trigger workflow in SAP build process Automation from sapui5 Simple Form
entry.content:
Project Explaination :

I have created simple ui form with following fields

 1.customerName
 2.orderNumber
 3.orderAmount
 4.orderDate
 5.shippingCountry
 6.expectedDeliveryDate
As well as created submit button on submission submit button will have to trigger SBPA workflow.
 
Issue:
After submitting I am getting 503 error(service unavailable) for the reference I attached controller.js, xs-app.json and output  screenshot. I tried using postman it works fine but not able to trigger workflow by using sapui5 form. Even I checked destination all fields are correct.
 
What should I make changes for solving this issue?

xs-app.json

xs-app.json
controller

 

 

 

 

 

controller.js

controller

controller.js

Output screenoutput

entry.title: Re: S4 Help needed - Does S4 have Regions of the world li...
entry.content:
Isn't Customizing 'Define Groups of Countries' in 'Assignment Master Data' available in your version?

  • SM34 on cluster VC_T76MGE_CGROUP
  • Available in S/4HANA 2021

entry.title: How to suppress mail alerts temporarily for single system
entry.content:
How to suppress alerts in Solution manager Monitoring during periods of downtime?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to suppress mail alerts temporarily for single sy...
entry.content:
It is possible to configure alerts to be suppressed in Solution manager System Monitoring when a planned workmode has been added in the IT calendar for a system. For further information please check:

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/solution-manager/expert-portal/it-calendar-work-mode-management.html

KBA 2598076 - Working with work mode specific settings in System Monitoring of Solution Manager  

KBA 2468223 - How to configure work mode specific settings for the Alerting in SAP Solution Manager

Disabling Monitoring and Alerting at a Global Level or Alert Level

https://gad5158842f.us2.hana.ondemand.com/dtp/viewer/#/tree/1920/actions/24808:24809

entry.title: Re: How to Update Attendance after it was submitted to Le...
entry.content:
Hello @margaretstraub , are you using Manage User Learning > Edit Learning History when updating the class completion of user? For the screenshot of the error, i found this kba 2300681 - Add Learning History Not Working or Duplicate Learning Events Error . please feel free to check if it works.

Thank you!

My doubt is to understand how the connection works between SAP BAS or SAP BTP in reality, with SAP S/4 HANA CLOUD PRIVATE.

I hope you can help me to understand more about the architecture, thanks!

entry.title: Modify Z* Db table not working
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a Zinvoice table with 'INVNO' as the ONLY key field.

Its type is XBLNR_KK which holds 16 chars.

I am updating this Z* table via reading big volume of data from flat file.

Sometimes i get same value for 'INVNO' field in different rows.
I use modify statement as below in the program.

modify zinvoice from wa_invoice.

Issues:
1)This statement is giving sy-subrc = 0 even when same 'INVNO' field is seen.
2) Also its NOT updating for different INVNO. What could be the reason?
3) Do i need to prefill 0's if INVNO is filled with 9 or 10 chars?

 

Can any one suggest pls.

entry.title: Re: 2 BO groups of conflicting folder permissions
entry.content:
The permission will be a combination of the two.  Anything granted to the user through either group will be allowed to the user.  In your case, I assume that you are using the default Access Levels that come pre-configured with Business Objects.  You can safely say that the Full Control access level will take precedence over the View on Demand access level on the reports in the folder.

The exception to this would be if any access level explicitly denies a right.  This will always over-ride any grant.  This would only come into play if you create custom access levels to use in your system.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
